_doc: Env vars / bindings that the controlplane code references but desktop intentionally does not provide. Keep entries short; the reason explains why and what (if anything) replaces it on desktop.

cloudOnly.FLY_API_TOKEN: Cloud-only — Fly.io per-dashboard VM provisioning. Desktop runs a single local VM, no provisioning.
cloudOnly.FLY_SANDBOX_CONTROLPLANE_URL: Cloud-only — sandbox→controlplane URL on Fly. Desktop sandbox uses CONTROLPLANE_URL from the VM env.
cloudOnly.FLY_WARM_POOL_REGIONS: Cloud-only — Fly.io warm pool. Desktop has no warm pool.
cloudOnly.STRIPE_SECRET_KEY: Cloud-only — billing. Desktop is self-hosted, paywall bypassed.
cloudOnly.STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET: Cloud-only — billing webhook verification. Desktop receives no Stripe webhooks.
cloudOnly.CF_ACCESS_AUD: Cloud-only — Cloudflare Access auth. Desktop uses DEV_AUTH_ENABLED.
cloudOnly.TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY: Cloud-only — Cloudflare Turnstile. Desktop has no public signup form.
cloudOnly.RATE_LIMITER: Cloud-only — Cloudflare Workers Rate Limiting binding. Code paths gracefully skip when undefined.
cloudOnly.RATE_LIMITER_AUTH: Cloud-only — Cloudflare Workers Rate Limiting binding. See RATE_LIMITER.
cloudOnly.GMAIL_PUBSUB_TOPIC: Cloud-only — Google Pub/Sub push notifications need a public URL. Desktop uses polling instead.
cloudOnly.BRIDGE_URL: External service — WhatsApp/Baileys bridge runs separately on Fly. Desktop does not bundle it yet.
cloudOnly.WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN: External service — Meta WhatsApp Business API requires a public webhook URL.
cloudOnly.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN: External service — Discord interaction webhook needs a public URL.
cloudOnly.SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET: External service — Slack events API needs a public URL.
cloudOnly.ADMIN_EMAILS: Multi-tenant only — single-user desktop has no admin/regular user split.
cloudOnly.ACCESS_CODE: Multi-tenant only — invite gating. Desktop has no signups.
cloudOnly.BROWSER_AUTH_DEBUG: Debug flag — only useful when CF Access is on.
cloudOnly.GEMINI_ORCABOT_KEY: Internal — Gemini wrangler env override only, not a desktop concern.
cloudOnly.DRIVE_CACHE: R2 bucket unavailable on desktop — controlplane/src/storage/drive-cache.ts substitutes a stub via ensureDriveCache().

_alwaysProvidedDoc: These are bindings whose presence the drift script can't infer from main.rs — they're declared in workerd.desktop.capnp (Durable Object namespaces / D1 / R2) and the workerd runtime injects them. Entries here are recognised as 'provided' by the drift script regardless of whether they appear in main.rs env plumbing.
